name: claude-wiki-plugins
description: Marketplace hosting the claude-wiki plugin family

plugins.name: claude-wiki
plugins.description: Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern for Obsidian + Claude Cowork. JP default, EN fallback. Requires kepano/obsidian-skills (hard dependency). 4 skills (setup-claude-wiki, add-page, lint-vault, query-wiki) + 4 hooks (.obsidian/ write-guard PreToolUse, vault-first-reminder SessionStart, auto-bump-updated + auto-read-related PostToolUse) + bundled CANONICAL.md schema.
